title: ZeroContact
description: Adding ballistic plates/Body armors to Modded Minecraft providing unique close combat experiences cooperating with TACZ.
body:
### This project is still in early dev. Bugs are expected. Make sure to report them in time.
ZeroContact is an armor mod that provides new mechanisms adds a collcetion of armor-piercing and projectile countermesures ,which works with TaCZ in the combat. It remasters the mechanic of how game calculate the bullet projectile damage, armor durability loss, and body part hitboxes.

## Features
- Many types of body armor, ballistic plate, plate-carrier and accessories.
- Recalculation mechanism for armor of incoming bullet damage.
- Custom datapack support for customizing the geckolib format of armor, plate, plate-carrier and the override method for modifying bullet damage.


![banner_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84c8f32c0d80857a1a41d92c175906fa681c2def_0.webp)

![BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/472715786527d6aab620cf2cd31e2899155ce997.png)
## Report & Suggestion
If you have any idea, hit the issue link or join my server, I'm very honored to have you becoming one of the nightly-build testers!
